tasks.check: deno check server/**/*.ts ui/**/*.ts cli/**/*.ts sdk/**/*.ts core/**/*.ts $(find templates -name '*.ts' ! -path 'templates/memory-agent/*') && deno lint && deno fmt --check && deno run -A npm:markdownlint-cli CLAUDE.md README.md cli/claude.md && deno task check:boundaries && deno task publish && deno test --quiet --allow-net --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --allow-run --unstable-worker-options && deno task test:templates
tasks.install-dev:
echo '#!/bin/sh
INIT_CWD="$(pwd)" exec deno run --allow-all --unstable-worker-options '"$(pwd)/cli/cli.ts"' "$@"' > "$HOME/.deno/bin/aai" && chmod +x "$HOME/.deno/bin/aai" && echo 'Installed aai to ~/.deno/bin/aai'
tasks.publish: cd sdk && deno publish --allow-dirty --dry-run && cd ../core && deno publish --allow-dirty --dry-run && cd ../ui && deno publish --allow-dirty --dry-run && cd ../cli && deno publish --allow-dirty --dry-run && cd ../server && deno publish --allow-dirty --dry-run && echo 'Dry run OK. Run deno task publish:live to publish.'
tasks.publish:live: cd sdk && deno publish --allow-dirty && cd ../core && deno publish --allow-dirty && cd ../ui && deno publish --allow-dirty
